title: Add Zephyr fleet telemetry
description: Standardize lichen.telemetry.v1 JSONL events across Python, Rust, and Zephyr with packet hashes, timestamps, identity, direction, status, radio fields, and analyzer support. Python/Rust compile and parser fixture pass; Zephyr fleet ELF builds. Three-way EC2 validation remains blocked by Renode EC2 provisioning/startup timeout after correcting invalid URL, architecture mismatch, and expiring Instance Connect polling.
